claim_boundary: The report proves only current ownership understanding and route selection; it does not validate the downstream proposal or implementation.

closure_rules.scope: current target revision and declared route only

forbidden_shortcuts.summary: Do not create a SkillGuard-owned alternate execution route.
Do not convert configured booleans, generated JSON, or progress into native pass evidence.
Do not skip required stages, checks, receipts, or blockers.

integration_claim_boundary: SkillGuard gates the target-native FlowGuard route; it does not execute a parallel controller or replace native model/test evidence.

native_check_inventory.summary: Run the tracked existing-model-preflight owner and ownership tests.

native_route_bindings.source: FlowGuard canonical route registry and target contract source

not_parallel_route_proof.evidence_source: Canonical route registry, contract source, and may_define_* false gates
not_parallel_route_proof.summary: SkillGuard only validates the FlowGuard-owned route and cannot define an alternate successful execution path.

phases.summary: Define the candidate change boundary and whether light or full preflight is required.
Search models, specs, docs, source surfaces, commitments, fields, and parent/child evidence.
Build ownership snapshots, model-angle/similarity rows, reuse decision, and duplicate-boundary risks.
Run the native preflight model and reject stale, missing, duplicate, or unsupported ownership.
Return affected commitments/siblings, stale gaps, reuse decision, and typed downstream owner without implementing.

quality_floors.summary: Prompt prose, progress, or generated records cannot replace native evidence.
Missing, stale, skipped, scoped, progress-only, or pass-with-gaps evidence cannot support broad closure.

required_evidence.source: FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact
FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact
FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact
FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact
FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact

route_inventory.summary: Search current modeled ownership, classify reuse, expose duplicate boundaries, and select the typed downstream owner.

do_not_use_when: The task is typo/format-only, greenfield with no model context, or asks for downstream implementation/validation rather than ownership grounding.
routes.summary: Search current modeled ownership, classify reuse, expose duplicate boundaries, and select the typed downstream owner.

runtime_lock_policy.applies_when: The flowguard-existing-model-preflight skill is selected or delegated.
runtime_lock_policy.summary: The target-local contract, route, stage order, checks, evidence, and coverage matrix gate closure.

source_requirements.summary: Preflight selects reuse and downstream ownership but cannot prove or implement the planned change.
Full preflight must search current model and source records and classify old-shape evidence before reuse.
FunctionBlock, state, field, side-effect, entrypoint, commitment, and layered ownership gaps remain visible.
Accept a target change boundary and project root; search current models/sources; choose reuse, extend, child, new boundary, or no-model-found; block unsupported ownership; hand typed work t.
Extract existing FunctionBlock, state, field, side-effect, entrypoint, commitment, and parent/child ownership.
Ground new work in existing model, behavior, field, state, side-effect, and entrypoint ownership before another route changes the boundary.
Route id: existing_model_preflight; role: public_owner; native owner: existing_model_preflight. This standalone FlowGuard satellite skill is a companion preflight, not the downstream change.
Use before proposals or implementation in an existing modeled system, especially where behavior commitments, fields, similar models, or parent/child evidence may already own the change.
The target section 'Use When' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
Edit .skillguard/contract-source.json, then regenerate derived contracts; SkillGuard checks preflight coverage and cannot approve the downstream change.
The target section 'Hard Gates' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
Verify the real FlowGuard check engine and AGENTS.md managed record; never create a fake mini-framework.
The target skill description must be represented in the contract: Use before non-trivial discussion, proposal, feature, bug, refactor, UI, test, prompt, skill, workflow, or process work in.
The target skill entrypoint and hard gates must be represented by the runtime contract.
Declared hard gates and required workflow steps must be represented by checks and closure blockers.
Do not implement, split code/tests/models, or replace route-native validation; skip typo/format/read-only work with no model context and return unclear work to model-first-function-flow.
The target section 'Do Not Use When' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
The target section 'Output Requirements' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
description: Use before non-trivial discussion, proposal, feature, bug, refactor, UI, test, prompt, skill, workflow, or process work in an existing modeled system to identify current owners.
The target section 'FlowGuard Existing Model Preflight' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
Full mode is required before proposal/implementation/major change; light notes cannot prove readiness.
Missing search, stale ownership, unresolved model angles, duplicate owners, or unreviewed layered-proof status blocks full preflight.
Record reuse decision, duplicate-boundary risks, affected siblings/commitments, stale gaps, and typed downstream route.
The target section 'Required Workflow' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
Return evidence, failures, blockers, skipped_checks, residual_risk, claim_boundary, and typed_next_actions, plus model hits, ownership, reuse decision, and duplicate risks.
Search model records, specs, docs, source surfaces, and repository-local FlowGuard records; classify old-shape evidence.
